privileged_info_summary: The ripple_effect task uses two real Unsplash images (1000x667 JPEG format, accessible at 200 OK status codes). No task.json metadata field exists to verify. The verifier checks for ripple distortion using four criteria: ≥5% pixel change, ≥2 profiles with wave patterns, 3-50 pixel mean magnitude, and edge displacement detection. The task requires 75% score (3/4 criteria) to pass.
